props.name: after

props.name: before
props.description: The slot to be rendered before the description. This can be used to render an icon or any other element before the description. props.name: closable

props.name: color

props.name: onClose
props.description: Event handler called when the close button is clicked. It can be prevented by calling `event.preventDefault`.

props.name: title
props.description: The title displayed within the alert.

props.name: variant
props.description: The layout variant of the alert.

    <ButtonGroup size="sm">
      <Tooltip
        align="center"
        animation={false}
        content="View raw code"
        delayDuration={0}
        side="top"
      >
        <ButtonGroup.Item>Raw</ButtonGroup.Item>
      </Tooltip>

      <Tooltip align="center" animation={false} content="Copy" delayDuration={0}>
        <ButtonGroup.Item isIconOnly>
          <CopyIcon />
        </ButtonGroup.Item>
      </Tooltip>

        <ButtonGroup.Item isIconOnly>

        </ButtonGroup.Item>
      </Tooltip>

        </ButtonGroup.Item>
      </Tooltip>

        <ButtonGroup.Item isIconOnly>
          <ChevronDownIcon />
        </ButtonGroup.Item>
      </Tooltip>
    </ButtonGroup>
  );
}
